mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of months following a rate cut.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that immediately suppress equity valuations over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of instances following the trigger.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and builder confidence, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST yields negative 60-day returns in >50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a late-cycle expansion reflects capacity utilization approaching peaks, which compresses equity risk premiums and generates positive 20-day S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases during late-cycle phases produce negative 20-day returns in >55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly increases in total nonfarm payrolls directly boost aggregate income expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive payroll revisions correlate with negative 20-day returns in >50% of months.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI increase exceeding 0.3% triggers immediate market repricing of future monetary tightening, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >65% of months following the CPI threshold breach.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent quarterly growth in real GDP and monthly personal consumption expenditures confirms broad-based demand expansion, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Combined positive GDPC1 and RSAFS growth yields negative 20-day returns in >50% of overlapping periods.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle signals supply-side contraction that outweighs rate hike benefits, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during tightening cycles yield positive 60-day returns in >55% of cases.
